name: No Activity Log profile / diagnostic settings configured
description: No Activity Log profile is configured to export subscription audit events to a storage account or Log Analytics workspace. Without this, management-plane activity logs are retained for only 90 days and may be lost before an investigation begins.
remediation: Create a Log Profile or Diagnostic Setting for the subscription Activity Log: az monitor diagnostic-settings subscription create --name <name> --logs '[{"category":"Administrative","enabled":true}]'. Send to Log Analytics with at least 1-year retention. Consider Azure Sentinel for SIEM-quality alerting.
